zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Fry於1639年12月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯時，她的父親William Fry34歲，母親Elizabeth Foster38歲。她於1665年4月26日與Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1696年5月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年56歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Fry于1639年12月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼維姆斯时，她的父亲William Fry34岁，母亲Elizabeth Foster38岁。她于1665年4月26日与Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1696年5月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年56岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Fry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southern and southwestern): from Middle English frie ‘free’ (Old English frīo, frīg), with reference either to rank or tenurial status (‘free-born’) or to character (‘generous, open-handed’). It is synonymous with Free .
Americanized form of German Frei or Frey , or of the Dutch cognate Vrij.

variants.name: Frye
meanings: History: Joseph Frye (1711/12–94) was a military officer from Andover, MA, where the family had long been of local prominence. In 1762, he was granted a township in ME, later named Fryeburg after him, and moved his family there. His great-great-grandson William Pierce Frye was born in Lewiston, ME, and served in Congress, first as a member of the House of Representatives and then the Senate from 1871 until his death in 1911.

variants.name: Free
meanings: English: nickname or status name from Middle English fre ‘free’ (Old English frēo), with reference to either tenurial status (‘free born’) or to character (‘noble, generous, open-handed’).
Americanized form of Swiss German and German   Frei   and   Frey  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Fry was born on 20 December 1639, in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Fry, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Foster, was 38. She married Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr on 26 April 1665, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 May 1696, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Fry est née le 20 décembre 1639, à Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Fry, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Foster, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr le 26 avril 1665, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1696, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Fry am 20. Dezember 1639 in Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Fry 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Foster 38. Sie hat am 26. April 1665 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1696 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fry è nata il il 20 dicembre 1639 nel Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Fry, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Foster, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr il 26 aprile 1665, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1696, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fryが1639年12月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエイモウスで生まれた時，父William Fryは34歳，母Elizabeth Fosterは38歳であった。1665年4月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでLt. Nathan Fiske Jrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1696年5月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで56歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터
ko.Weymouth, Weymouth, Norfolk, Massachuset: 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 w이모우스 w이모우스

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Fry(이)가 1639년 12월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 w이모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Fry(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Foster(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1665년 4월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1696년 5월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Fry nasceu em 20 de dezembro de 1639, em Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Fry, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Foster, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr em 26 de abril de 1665, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1696, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Fry родилась 20 декабря 1639 г. в местности вимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Fry было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Foster, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr 26 апреля 1665 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 мая 1696 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Fry nació el 20 de diciembre de 1639, en Weymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Fry, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Foster, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr el 26 de abril de 1665, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1696, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
